    PropertyNamingStrategies.KebabCaseStrategy - com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json中的类
    Naming strategy similar to PropertyNamingStrategies.SnakeCaseStrategy, but instead of underscores as separators, uses hyphens.
    PropertyNamingStrategies.LowerCamelCaseStrategy - com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json中的类
    "No-operation" strategy that is equivalent to not specifying any strategy: will simply return suggested standard bean naming as-is.
    PropertyNamingStrategies.LowerCaseStrategy - com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json中的类
    Simple strategy where external name simply only uses lower-case characters, and no separators.
    PropertyNamingStrategies.LowerDotCaseStrategy - com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json中的类
    Naming strategy similar to PropertyNamingStrategies.KebabCaseStrategy, but instead of hyphens as separators, uses dots.
    PropertyNamingStrategies.NamingBase - com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json中的类
    Intermediate base class for simple implementations
    PropertyNamingStrategies.SnakeCaseStrategy - com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json中的类
    property names to lower case JSON element names, separated by underscores.
    PropertyNamingStrategies.UpperCamelCaseStrategy - com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json中的类
    property names to PascalCase JSON element names (i.e., with a capital first letter).
    PropertyNamingStrategies.UpperSnakeCaseStrategy - com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json中的类
    at translates an input to the equivalent upper case snake case.
